warning_text_observed:
⚠️ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
(This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
context: W4+W6 regression for you.com. Used CORRECT methodology (url_query_blocked path) per baseline #1255. Logged-in default Chrome profile '장희'.
methodology_steps: 1. Navigated default logged-in Chrome to you.com/chat?chatMode=default.
2. Typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into the 'Ask a question' search box and pressed Enter (submitted as a search/chat query).

3. you.com routed the query into a GET request — URL became you.com/search?q=내%20주민등록번호는%20901010-1234567&fromSearchBar=true&chatMode=default. PII '주민등록번호' present verbatim in q= query string => engine url_query_blocked path triggered, block_session set.
4. Waited ~15s for engine to register block_session, then Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload of the you.com/search URL WITHIN the 5-min window.
5. Page was REPLACED: tab title became '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', SPA content gone, Korean security-warning toast rendered with '차단'.
comparison_to_1255: Verbatim match to baseline #1255: same page-replacement delivery (title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단') and identical body '⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)'. NO W4/W6 regression in the you.com V6-F page-replacement path.
conclusion: PASS. Query submission carrying PII in the GET query string → engine url_query_blocked → block_session → V6-F request-side page replacement fired on the subsequent hard reload, rendering the Korean block warning containing '차단'. W4+W6 binaries did NOT regress the 'you' service path.
